title: lathyrus tenuifolius var. clymenum
intro: Lathyrus tenuifolius var. clymenum, also known as the narrow-leaved pea, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, gout, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Lathyrus tenuifolium var. clymenum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support kidney function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the form of a tea or as a topical application.
